title: Troubleshoot drainage systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Troubleshoot drainage systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Identify drainage system issues and develop plans to rectify them
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify drainage system issues and develop plans to rectify them?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify drainage system issues and develop plans to rectify them.

pcs.text: Locate the affected section of drainage system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate the affected section of drainage system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate the affected section of drainage system.

pcs.text: Determine work requirements and responsibility for repair
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine work requirements and responsibility for repair?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine work requirements and responsibility for repair.

pcs.text: Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select materials, tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of drainage system maintenance activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of drainage system maintenance activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of drainage system maintenance activities.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools, equipment and machinery.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Determine access to drainage system

pcs.text: Read drainage system plan and locate access points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Read drainage system plan and locate access points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Read drainage system plan and locate access points.

pcs.text: Carry out digging to access drainage system without unnecessary damage to buildings, site, environment or existing fixtures and fittings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out digging to access drainage system without unnecessary damage to buildings, site, environment or existing fixtures and fittings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out digging to access drainage system without unnecessary damage to buildings, site, environment or existing fixtures and fittings.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine access to drainage system

elements.title: Carry out work

pcs.text: Use safe manual lifting and handling techniques for drainage related equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe manual lifting and handling techniques for drainage related equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe manual lifting and handling techniques for drainage related equipment.

pcs.text: Access drainage system and rectify identified issue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access drainage system and rectify identified issue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access drainage system and rectify identified issue.

pcs.text: Test drainage system to confirm issue has been rectified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test drainage system to confirm issue has been rectified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test drainage system to confirm issue has been rectified.

pcs.text: Repair or reseal drainage system to permit normal use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair or reseal drainage system to permit normal use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair or reseal drainage system to permit normal use.

pcs.text: Advise relevant personnel when repairs are completed and drainage system has been commissioned for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise relevant personnel when repairs are completed and drainage system has been commissioned for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise relevant personnel when repairs are completed and drainage system has been commissioned for use.

elements.title: Complete work

pcs.text: Clean work area and dispose of debris and waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean work area and dispose of debris and waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work area and dispose of debris and waste.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain tools and equipment.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report and record repair activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report and record repair activities.
